title: Flotilla activists recount Israeli violence as they arrive in Turkiye
full_text:
Flotilla activists recount Israeli violence as they arrive in Turkiye
Flotilla activists recount Israeli violence as they arrive in Turkiye
Hundreds of activists from the Global Sumud Flotilla arrived in Istanbul on Thursday after being intercepted, detained, and deported by Israeli forces. The activists describe the violence they faced in detention.
Published On 21 May 2026
